description: Detects unused static functions and unreachable code in C++. Simplified from Rust: uses select:symbol to flag unexported (file-scope) functions as potentially unused, without rolling-hash cross-reference counting or unreachable-after-return detection. Precision reduced -- static functions that are called are also flagged (no reference counting in JSON DSL).

flag.message: Unexported function detected -- verify it is referenced within the file; static functions with no callers are dead code
